landing.meta_title: CeleOne | Celestial Christian Mobile Social Platform
landing.meta_desc: CeleOne centralizes ECC updates, reforms, official decisions, community chat, and live TV/Radio in a secure space.
landing.title: CeleOne, a mobile social platform for the Celestial Christian community.
landing.p1: A communication and information app that brings together news, reforms, official decisions and community exchanges in one secure interactive space.
landing.p2: Goal: help believers access trusted information, understand important decisions, join discussions, and reduce fake news.
landing.docs_value: Includes important and crucial ECC documents for public reference.
landing.live_value: Multiple TV/Web TV channels + Radio Alleluia FM can stream on the platform.
landing.f1_desc: Centralized official decisions, reforms and validated information.
landing.f2_desc: Chatrooms and comments for public opinion and civic engagement.
landing.f3_desc: Simple and accessible infrastructure for channels to stream directly.
landing.channels_desc: TV channels can request placement and stream directly in CeleOne.
landing.spiritual_value: Weekly themes, services, Bible lessons and hymn programs.

jeunesse.meta_desc: Register children online and verify Amis de Jesus concours results.
jeunesse.title: Amis de Jesus - Jeunesse
jeunesse.subtitle: Online child registration and concours results verification.
jeunesse.not_found: No results found for this identifier/year.

spiritual.meta_desc: Read weekly themes, services, Bible lessons, special celebrations, and hymn programs.
spiritual.title: Weekly Themes and Hymn Programs
spiritual.subtitle: Browse the annual church spiritual program by year, month, week, services, and special celebrations.
spiritual.empty_current: No active week has been published yet.
spiritual.browse_desc: Search themes, Bible references, and past weekly programs.
